name: IBM Cloudant API
description: IBM Cloudant is a distributed, JSON-based NoSQL database as a service (DBaaS) built on Apache CouchDB. It provides HTTP REST API for creating, reading, updating, and deleting databases and documents, running MapReduce views, full-text search via Lucene, and geospatial queries. Supports replication and change feeds.
